1.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
1.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

2.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
2.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

3.gl: compare G34 (ἀγέλη)) (to bring tidings); a messenger; especially an "angel"; by implication, a pastor
